VAULT
v0.6.0
OAuth PKCE
Auto-Refresh
◆
MCP Native
◆
Secure
$ hermes-vault oauth login github
✓ tokens stored — vault encrypted
$ hermes-vault oauth refresh --all
✓ github/primary refreshed · expires 28800s
✓ google/work refreshed · expires 3599s
LOCAL-FIRST
ENCRYPTED
OPEN SOURCE
Credential broker for AI agents
$ pip install hermes-vault==0.6.0
